title: cordiera carioca
intro: Cordiera carioca, also known as Cordia ecalyculata, is a plant species in the bignonia family, native to Brazil and other parts of South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cordiera carioca include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant. Cordiera carioca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
